model: R3D-18 (Kinetics, fine-tune) ⊕ YOLOv8-pose GRU(51->128), two-stream feature fusion, T=16
selection: best epoch by val macro-F1 (same as baseline R3D-18)
split: cross-subject group_split seed42 val/test .15 (same as baseline12)
note: Same RGB recipe as baseline12; pose added as 2nd stream to isolate pose effect. Pose uses eval-aligned central clip.
